---
title: "Slot Binding Types"
---

## Overview

Session binding types for deep learning inference live under
`src/DeepLearning/bindings/`. They are Qt-free, reflect-cpp serializable, and
consumed by `SlotAssembler`, `InferenceController`, `DeepLearningState`, and
planned headless commands.

| Header | Contents |
|---|---|
| `DeepLearningBindingData.hpp` | Memory frame bindings, static/recurrent variants, `computeEncodingFrame`, `recurrentCacheKey` |
| `EncoderDecoderBindingTypes.hpp` | `dl::EncoderVariant`, `dl::DecoderVariant` (`rfl::TaggedUnion`) |
| `SlotBindingTypes.hpp` | `SlotBindingData`, `OutputBindingData`, `dl::PostEncoderStepDescriptor` |
| `BindingParamSchemas.hpp` | AutoParamWidget form structs, `ParameterUIHints`, conversion helpers |

Memory-frame types and accessors are documented in
[memory_frames.qmd](memory_frames.qmd). UI form projections are in
[binding_param_schemas.qmd](binding_param_schemas.qmd).

## EncoderVariant / DecoderVariant

Tagged unions over the per-component param structs in `channel_encoding/` and
`channel_decoding/`. These are the **only** encoder/decoder parameter variant
types — `EncoderDispatch` and `DecoderDispatch` take `EncoderVariant` /
`DecoderVariant` directly (no parallel `std::variant` aliases).

| Union | Discriminator | Alternatives |
|---|---|---|
| `dl::EncoderVariant` | `"encoder"` | `ImageEncoderParams`, `Point2DEncoderParams`, `Mask2DEncoderParams`, `Line2DEncoderParams` |
| `dl::DecoderVariant` | `"decoder"` | `MaskDecoderParams`, `PointDecoderParams`, `LineDecoderParams`, `FeatureVectorDecoderParams` |

JSON uses internally tagged discriminators, e.g.:

```json
{"encoder":"ImageEncoderParams","normalize":true}
```

## SlotBindingData

Persisted dynamic (per-frame) input binding for workspace JSON:

```cpp
struct SlotBindingData {
    std::string slot_name;              // model input slot name
    std::string data_key;               // DataManager key (empty = unconfigured)
    dl::EncoderVariant encoder = dl::ImageEncoderParams{};
    int time_offset = 0;                // added to current_frame (+ batch index)
};
```

`time_offset` is combined with the current frame via `computeEncodingFrame()` in
`DeepLearningBindingData.hpp`, which clamps the result to `[0, max_frame]`.

## OutputBindingData

Persisted model output binding:

```cpp
struct OutputBindingData {
    std::string slot_name;
    std::string data_key;               // DataManager write target
    dl::DecoderVariant decoder = dl::MaskDecoderParams{};
};
```

## PostEncoderStepDescriptor

Post-encoder module configuration stored alongside slot bindings:

```cpp
namespace dl {
struct PostEncoderStepDescriptor {
    std::string module_key = "none";    // "none" or empty = disabled
    std::string parameters_json = "{}";
};
}
```

Parameter schemas are resolved at runtime from `PostEncoderModuleRegistry` when
the widget loads a module's form.

## Session persistence

`DeepLearningStateData` (serialized by `DeepLearningState`) holds the full
inference session configuration:

```cpp
struct DeepLearningStateData {
    std::vector<SlotBindingData> input_bindings;
    std::vector<OutputBindingData> output_bindings;
    std::vector<dl::MemoryFrameBinding> memory_frames;
    dl::PostEncoderStepDescriptor post_encoder_params;
    // ... model_id, weights_path, batch_size, current_frame, etc.
};
```

Vectors are keyed by `slot_name` at runtime; the UI creates one widget per
model slot and reads/writes the matching binding entry.

## Tests

| Test file | Coverage |
|---|---|
| `tests/DeepLearning/bindings/BindingTypes.test.cpp` | `EncoderVariant` / `DecoderVariant` schema + JSON, `SlotBindingData` / `OutputBindingData` round-trips, `PostEncoderStepDescriptor`, form helper mapping |
| `tests/DeepLearning/binding_data/BindingData.test.cpp` | `computeEncodingFrame`, `MemoryFrameBinding` accessors, `RecurrentInitMode` string conversion, `recurrentCacheKey` |

Filter with `ctest -R "dl_bindings"` or `ctest -R "binding_data"`.
